author: @kingflares2
text: It was a fun event on stream - The vod had the full runs. But basically, the goal is to scale as long as possible in Alert 5 without dying. The funny thing is. Pontos ran into the problem that we could've scaled longer. Just... blue tentacles would've killed the boss. Doresain had the opposite problem. We had to kill the boss before it killed us.
video_title: [Morimens] Final Pontos Vs Doresain video. Their best case teams, who scales faster given EVERYTHING
